case_title: GREAT WESTERN BANK, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK vs. BELL, GENEVA

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREAT WESTERN BANK, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK AS TO DEFENDANT BELL, GENEVA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREAT WESTERN BANK, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELL, GENEVA $3,417.84 PRINCIPAL, $2,266.93 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,698.77, RENEWAL OF OLD CASE # 045722 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
